case_title: RODERICK PARKER VS. MOHAMMAD Q. AZEEM

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD FILED BY PARKER, RODERICK
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUN-10-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO APPEARANCES.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PARKER, RODERICK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AZEEM, MOHAMMAD Q. $3,336.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,416.00, $1600.00 (FOR DEPOSIT PAID FOR TIRES AND RIMS); $736 TRAVEL COSTS TO HEARING; $1,000.00 PUNITIVE DAMAGES. (COURT FINDS DEFENDANT ACTED IN BAD FAITH BY NOT RETURNING PLAINTIIF'S MONEY) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAR-29-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO APPEARANCES.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-19-2009 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT AZEEM, MOHAMMAD Q. HEARING SET FOR JUN-10-2010 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
